sections.paragraph: plur. f. plain and open regions, country, villages, opp. to fortified cities and to those in the mountains, i.q. בִּקְעָה. (Arab. فَرْزُ plain.) Eze 38:11. Est 9:19, “the cities of the plain country,” opp. to the metropolis, verse 18 . Zec 2:8, “Jerusalem shall be dwelt in without being walled.”
